intent: No source file over 800 lines (God file) — split it.
No function with cyclomatic complexity over 12 — flags branchy hard-to-test functions.
Coarse backstop: no function over 150 lines (catches huge-but-flat functions complexity misses).
No module imported by more than 20 files (coupling hub / God module). Excludes test files; admits zero-behavior type/contract modules (domain.ts).
Every source module under src/ ships with a test (src/foo.ts <-> test/foo.test.ts). Ratchet grandfathers existing; blocks new untested files.
No test pinned to a frozen git ref/SHA.
